subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! God willing, mayest thou attain unto true sincerity and be adorned with the ornament of trustworthiness. Blessed is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق انشاء الله بصدق حقیقی فائز شوی و بطراز امانت مزین گردی طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels
